name: Formal Request Letter / General Petition
description: A standard formal letter format used to submit a request, complaint, or information to authorities, institutions, or businesses.
content:
From:
{{applicant_name}}
{{applicant_address}}
ID / SSN: {{applicant_id_no}}
Phone: {{applicant_phone}}

Date: {{formatDate letter_date}}

To:
{{addressee_authority}}
{{city_state}}

Subject / RE: {{subject}}

To Whom It May Concern,

{{body_text}}

I kindly request your prompt attention to this matter and ask that the necessary actions be taken regarding my request. I am happy to provide any further information if required.

Thank you for your time and assistance.

Sincerely,

_________________________
{{applicant_name}}

{{#if attachments}}

Enclosures / Attachments:

{{attachments}}
{{/if}}

fields.name: addressee_authority
fields.label: Name of Authority / Department
fields.placeholder: e.g., Department of Housing, XYZ Corporation HR

fields.name: subject
fields.label: Subject of Request
fields.placeholder: Briefly state the purpose of this letter.

fields.name: body_text
fields.label: Body / Explanation / Request Details
fields.placeholder: Explain the situation and your request in detail.

fields.name: attachments
fields.label: Enclosures / Attachments (Optional)
fields.placeholder:
1- Copy of ID
2- Proof of Address
